title: Surgeries and Advice | Anna Dixon MP
text_excerpt: --> Surgeries and Advice | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Surgeries and advice If you need to reach me, please email anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk or phone 01274 720279 providing your name, address and the details of your concern. In some cases, your message will be picked up by a member of my team who will work with you to resolve your issue on my behalf. However, if you need to speak with me personally, I would be happy to arrange a surgery time with you. My surgeries take place over phone or zoom on Friday mornings. If you would like to speak with me face-to-face I am also holding ‘Ask Anna’ events across the constituency over the coming months. You are very welcome to join me to discuss any concerns you have, whether local or national. Please note that for security reasons the exact location will be given 12 hours before the event. ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ The events currently in my calendar are: ​ ​ ​ Friday, 13 March 2026 - Saltaire Thursday, 9 April 2026 - Bingley Friday, 17 April 2026 - Baildon Friday, 15 May 2026 - Windhill ​ You can reserve a spot for an Ask Anna event here: Anna Dixon, Labour MP for Shipley Events - 1 Upcoming Activities and Tickets | Eventbrite In addition, I will be holding regular Facebook live sessions to make myself as accessible as possible. These will run in a similar way to the in-person events. Constituents are invited to submit questions ahead of the session, which I can respond to live on Facebook. © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP. All rights reserved. Contact Me: Email: anna.dixon.mp@parliament.uk ​ Address: House of Commons, London, SW1A OAA Phone: 01274 790279 Social Channels bottom of page
